_meta.description: Curated prompts that map to Sentinel-MCP abilities.

prompts.title: Show me my site structure
prompts.description: Returns all CPTs, taxonomies and meta fields.
prompts.prompt: List all custom post types, taxonomies and meta fields in this site so I understand the schema before editing.

prompts.title: List my custom post types
prompts.prompt: List all post types registered on this site, public and private, with their labels and supports.

prompts.title: Inspect the product CPT
prompts.prompt: Inspect the post type "product" and tell me which taxonomies and ACF fields it has.

prompts.title: Show me my taxonomies
prompts.description: List taxonomies and what CPTs they apply to.
prompts.prompt: List every taxonomy on this site, which post types it applies to, whether it is hierarchical and public.

prompts.title: Show registered shortcodes
prompts.prompt: List all shortcodes registered on this site so I know what is available to use in posts.

prompts.title: Create a 800-word blog post about X
prompts.prompt: Create a draft blog post titled "<your topic>" with around 800 words structured in Gutenberg blocks (intro, three H2 sections, conclusion). Set the category to "news" and leave it as draft for review.

prompts.title: Update the title of my last post
prompts.description: Quick edit to the most recent post.
prompts.prompt: Find my most recent published post and update its title to "<new title>". Keep all other fields unchanged.

prompts.title: Find drafts from last month
prompts.prompt: Search for all posts in status "draft" modified in the last 30 days and list them with id, title and last modified date.

prompts.title: List my scheduled posts
prompts.prompt: List all posts scheduled to be published in the future, ordered by date ASC, with id, title and scheduled date.

prompts.title: List trashed posts before purging
prompts.prompt: List all posts currently in the trash so I can review what would be permanently deleted.

prompts.title: Show revisions of post #ID
prompts.prompt: List the revisions of post #<ID> (autosaves and saved revisions) with their dates and content lengths.

prompts.title: Add a featured image
prompts.description: Set the featured image of a post.
prompts.prompt: Set attachment ID #<MEDIA_ID> as the featured image of post #<POST_ID>.

prompts.title: Search posts by keyword
prompts.prompt: Search all post types for the keyword "<your keyword>" and return the top 10 matches with id, title and post type.

prompts.title: Add a category to many posts
prompts.prompt: For every published post that contains the word "tutorial" in the title, add the category "tutorials".

prompts.title: Create a page from outline
prompts.prompt: Create a draft page titled "About" with these sections (Mission, Team, Contact) using H2 headings and a paragraph block under each.

prompts.title: List pending comments
prompts.prompt: List all comments awaiting moderation (status hold) with author, date and a 200-char excerpt.

prompts.title: Approve all pending from trusted authors
prompts.prompt: List pending comments. Approve any whose author email matches "@<your-domain>.com" and report what you did.

prompts.title: Trash spam comments
prompts.prompt: List comments marked as spam and move all of them to the trash.

prompts.title: Find images without alt text
prompts.prompt: List media library items of mime image/jpeg or image/png whose alt text is empty, paginated 20 per page.

prompts.title: Upload an image from URL
prompts.prompt: Upload the image at "<URL>" to the media library and set it as featured image of post #<POST_ID>.

prompts.title: Audit media usage
prompts.prompt: Show me total media count by mime type and the total size on disk used by the uploads folder.

prompts.title: Content audit summary
prompts.prompt: Give me a content audit: posts per CPT broken down by status, comments by status, users per role, and total media.

prompts.title: How many drafts do I have?
prompts.prompt: How many draft posts do I have right now in each post type?

prompts.title: Disk usage by mime
prompts.prompt: Break down the media library by mime type and tell me which type uses the most disk space.

prompts.title: Top 10 products by name
prompts.prompt: List the first 10 products in my WooCommerce store with name, price and stock status.

prompts.title: Recent orders pending
prompts.prompt: List the 20 most recent WooCommerce orders in status "processing" or "on-hold". Show id, status, total and date.

prompts.title: Active coupons
prompts.prompt: List all WooCommerce coupons with code, discount type, amount, usage count and expiry date.

prompts.title: Store info snapshot
prompts.prompt: Show me the WooCommerce store info: name, base country, currency, weight unit and whether prices include tax.

prompts.title: Coupons close to expiry
prompts.prompt: List WooCommerce coupons whose expiry_date is in the next 30 days.

prompts.title: Read SEO meta of my homepage
prompts.prompt: Read the SEO meta (title, description, focus keyword, canonical, noindex) of my homepage.

prompts.title: Find posts with no meta description
prompts.prompt: For my last 50 published posts, read their SEO meta and report which ones have an empty description.

prompts.title: Detect which SEO plugin is active
prompts.prompt: Read the SEO meta of post #1 and tell me which SEO plugin is providing the data (Yoast, Rank Math, AIOSEO, etc.).

prompts.title: List my languages
prompts.prompt: List the languages currently active on this site (code, name, locale, default flag).

prompts.title: Show translations of a post
prompts.prompt: List the translations of post #<POST_ID> across all languages with their translated post id and status.

prompts.title: Get my About page in French
prompts.prompt: Find my About page and return its content in the French translation if it exists.

prompts.title: What can I do with WooCommerce in Premium?
prompts.prompt: What WooCommerce-related abilities does the Premium edition unlock that the Lite version does not have?

prompts.title: What can Premium do for SEO?
prompts.prompt: What SEO write/edit abilities does the Premium edition unlock?

prompts.title: Catalog of Premium features
prompts.prompt: Show me the full catalog of features available in the Premium edition grouped by category.
